REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ROJAS, CARLOS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, HAYLEE INDIVIDUALS WONG, SUZANNE INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROJAS, CARLOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 615 A MINNA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, HAYLEE INDIVIDUALS WONG, SUZANNE INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT ROJAS, CARLOS DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DECLARATION OF NO WRITTEN FOUND. FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, HAYLEE INDIVIDUALS WONG, SUZANNE INDIVIDUAL
